creator: brian@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I believe this is fixed.  The latest copy of ppp can be found 
from http://www.Awfulhak.org/ppp.html. 
Ppp now notices if it's spinning and starts sleeping in between 
selects assuming that it's getting bad select results because 
of full tty buffers (which isn't a problem in -current, but may 
have been in the past). 
Can the original submitter (is he still there?) confirm that things 
are now ok with the latest version ?
